2606.28670.title: MACROCAST: A Vintage-Consistent Time Series Foundation Model for Real-Time Macroeconomic Forecasting
2606.28670.paper_summary: We introduce MACROCAST, a lightweight Time Series Foundation Model (TSFM) for real-time macroeconomic forecasting. Existing TSFMs suffer from data leakage in two forms: temporal contamination, as the model may have seen the realized values of the series it forecasts, and revision bias, as training on fully revised data diverges from the preliminary, vintage-specific releases available to real-time forecasters. MACROCAST is, to our knowledge, the first TSFM that rules out both forms of leakage entirely: at no stage of training is the model exposed to information that would not have been available to a forecaster in real time. We train MACROCAST first on purely synthetic time series in approximately one GPU-day and then fine-tune it on synthetic time series drawn from Bayesian VARs, dynamic factor models, and ARIMA specifications estimated on vintage-specific ALFRED data. Because pretraining uses only simulated data and fine-tuning uses only real-time vintages, no observed future or revised value ever enters the model; each fine-tuning run takes nine minutes. Evaluated on the FRED-MD database in a genuine real-time out-of-sample exercise, MACROCAST improves on the AR(1) benchmark for roughly 80% of series-horizon pairs, matches or surpasses Chronos-2 -- the strongest currently available TSFM -- and outperforms the Bayesian VAR and dynamic factor model benchmarks, all in a data-leakage-free manner.
2606.28670.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 MACROCAST，一個輕量級的時間序列基礎模型 (TSFM)，用於實時宏觀經濟預測。現有的 TSFM 受到兩種形式的數據洩漏影響：時間污染，因為模型可能已經看到了它預測的系列的實現值，以及修訂偏差，因為在完全修訂的數據上進行訓練與可供實時預測者使用的初步、特定年份的發布數據有所偏離。據我們所知，MACROCAST 是第一個完全排除這兩種洩漏形式的 TSFM：在訓練的任何階段，模型都不會接觸到在實時下預測者無法獲得的信息。我們首先在約一個 GPU 天的時間內，對純合成時間序列訓練 MACROCAST，然後在從貝葉斯 VAR、動態因子模型和基於特定年份的 ALFRED 數據估算的 ARIMA 規範中抽取的合成時間序列上進行微調。由於預訓練僅使用模擬數據，微調僅使用實時年份，因此沒有觀察到的未來或修訂值進入模型；每次微調運行需要九分鐘。在 FRED-MD 數據庫上進行的真正實時外部樣本評估中，MACROCAST 在大約 80% 的系列-預測期對上超越了 AR(1) 基準，與 Chronos-2（目前可用的最強 TSFM）持平或超過，並且在無數據洩漏的情況下超越了貝葉斯 VAR 和動態因子模型基準。
2606.28670.author: Andrea Carriero et.al.
2606.28670.authors: Andrea Carriero, Davide Pettenuzzo, Shubhranshu Shekhar
